docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DIANNE WERNER FILED BY DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MOHAMED ALAOUDI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,370.97 FILED BY ALAOUDI, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-14-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO
